category_sources: source_facts.description says yeet is a packaging tool with JavaScript build instructions; official GitHub README describes declaring build instructions as JavaScript snippets and building packages such as RPMs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is yeet; official GitHub README heading is 'yeet'.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to official API documentation in doc/api.md for the Yeetfile API.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/TecharoHQ/yeet; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README/API docs identify JavaScript build snippets, Yeetfile API, native package helpers, and CLI installation.
